title: Configure people column to allow selection of members of a team only
excerpt:
Enhance the configuration of the People column to include “select from members of team” 
This way a Sales Rep column could be configured to only show members of the sales reps team to ensure a sales rep is assigned and n…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Enhance the configuration of the People column to include “select from members of team”

This way a Sales Rep column could be configured to only show members of the sales reps team to ensure a sales rep is assigned and not a similarly named Project Manager.

posts.author: ssutcliffe (Shayne Sutcliffe)
posts.cookedHtml: I second this feature request, currently we are running both the CRM module as well as the Work Management Module and have task assignments on both platforms that I’d like to limit the pool of available assignees to to reduce the chance of errors and incorrect notifications (i.e. on the CRM side, I’d like to configure the assigned to (People) column to ONLY allow certain users/names so I can’t accidently add someone from our QA/Production team to the estimating task).

posts.author: abuislam (abuislam)
posts.cookedHtml: I love this suggestion, Cody! Having the People column show only team members would definitely help avoid mix-ups. Surah Al-Infitar (سورة الانفطار) reminds us how important order is in our roles. Has there been any progress on this idea?
